title: MultiPlanet
description: Most powerful translation solution for every minecraft server!
body:
**Description**

This plugin solves the issue of language barriers on multiplayer Minecraft servers. It enables players to communicate seamlessly by translating chat, private messages, and system text into each player's native language in real-time, ensuring a truly global community without affecting server performance.

**Features**
* Translates global chat, plugins outputs and much more!
* Automatically detects player language from the Minecraft client upon joining.
* Asynchronous translation processing to ensure zero server lag (maintains perfect TPS).
* Supports 6 different translation engines, including Google, MyMemory, and Custom Providers.
* Smart caching system to reuse previous translations and save API costs.
* Full compatibility with PlaceholderAPI and popular chat managers (LPC, EssentialsX, CMI).

**Commands**
| Command | Description | Permission |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| /lang | Opens a menu for players to manually choose their language. | None (All players) |
| /lang it/en/es | Changes the language to the selected one | None (All players) |
| /lang tab translate | Translates the TAB and Scoreboard | multiplanet.admin |

**Permissions**
| Permission | Description |
| :--- | :--- |
| multiplanet.admin | Allows use of the reload, stats and tab command to refresh plugin configuration. |

**Why use MultiPlanet?**
Minecraft servers often host players from all over the world, but language barriers can limit player interaction and community growth. This plugin solves that by automatically translating all communication in real-time based on the player's own client settings. It runs entirely in the background to prevent lag, making it the perfect tool to connect your player base globally.

**Requirements:**

1. PlaceHolderAPI (PAPI) 2.12.2 or newer
1. ProtocolLib 5.4.0 or newer

*Made by OrionStudios Development*
